description_long: This object is a visually striking shotgun with a steampunk-inspired design, featuring a combination of metallic and wooden elements. The main body is constructed from a dark, polished wood with ornate engravings, while the barrel and upper components are made of brass or copper-toned metal, giving it a vintage, industrial look. A prominent cylindrical scope with adjustment knobs and a pressure gauge is mounted on top, suggesting enhanced targeting capabilities. The trigger area is protected by a rounded, openwork metal guard, and the grip is ergonomically shaped with visible wood grain and metallic inlays. The shotgun's barrel is relatively short and thick, with additional metallic fittings and rivets along its length. Decorative gears and mechanical details are integrated into the design, emphasizing its unique, handcrafted appearance.
description: A steampunk-style shotgun with ornate wood and brass construction, featuring a mounted scope and decorative mechanical details. The design combines vintage aesthetics with industrial elements for a distinctive look.
description_view_0: Side view showing the ornate wooden grip, brass barrel, mounted scope, and visible mechanical details.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular barrel opening, scope alignment, and compact width of the shotgun.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the pressure gauge on the scope, wood grain grip, and additional metallic fittings.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the ergonomic wooden grip, trigger guard, and the alignment of the scope and barrel.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, short and thick with metallic fittings and no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, openwork metal guard with a medium size and decorative cutouts
